meta.title: Kling 2.6 Pro AI Video Generator | Kuaishou | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create stunning videos with Kling 2.6 Pro from Kuaishou. Simultaneous audio-visual generation with speech, sound effects, and ambient sounds. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Kling 2.6 Pro is Kuaishou's latest video model featuring simultaneous audio-visual generation. Generate videos complete with speech, sound effects, and ambient sounds in a single pass, revolutionizing the AI video creation workflow.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Kling 2.6 Pro Kuaishou's most advanced video model

audioVisual.title: Simultaneous Audio-Visual
audioVisual.description: Generate visuals, natural voiceovers, sound effects, and ambient atmosphere in a single pass - no more separate dubbing workflows.

voiceGeneration.title: World-Leading Voice Generation
voiceGeneration.description: Exceptional Chinese and English voice generation with tight coordination between voice rhythm, ambient sound, and visual motion.

audioQuality.title: Professional Audio Quality
audioQuality.description: Generate cleaner, richly layered audio that closely mirrors realistic audio mixing, meeting professional-grade production standards.

semanticUnderstanding.title: Robust Semantic Understanding
semanticUnderstanding.description: Accurately captures creator intent from textual descriptions, colloquial expressions, and complex storylines across varied scenarios.

multiAudio.title: Versatile Audio Types
multiAudio.description: Support for speech, dialogue, narration, singing, rap, ambient sound effects, and mixed sound effects in generated videos.

lipSync.title: Accurate Lip Sync
lipSync.description: Deep alignment ensures visual dynamics match audio rhythms, eliminating mismatched audio-video experiences.

gallery.title: See It In Action
gallery.subtitle: Real examples and use cases created with Kling 2.6 Pro on OpenCreator

advertising.title: Short Ads
advertising.useCase: One-click generation of short ads featuring narration, character dialogue, and product showcases with comprehensive sound effects.

social.title: Social Media Content
social.useCase: Create engaging social content with multi-character dialogue, interviews, scripted performances, and comedy skits.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Videos
ecommerce.useCase: Automate creation of product showcase videos highlighting key selling points with narration and monologue.

music.title: Music Performance
music.useCase: Generate music videos with singing, rap, and instrumental performances with accurate lip synchronization.

dialogue.title: Character Dialogue
dialogue.useCase: Create videos with natural multi-character dialogue, interviews, and scripted performances.

narration.title: Narrated Content
narration.useCase: Generate videos with professional narration and ambient sound effects for storytelling.

0.question: What is Kling 2.6 Pro and who developed it?
0.answer: Kling 2.6 Pro is Kuaishou's latest AI video model released in December 2025. It features simultaneous audio-visual generation, producing videos complete with speech, sound effects, and ambient sounds in a single pass.

1.question: What types of content can I create with Kling 2.6 Pro?
1.answer: Kling 2.6 Pro excels at creating advertising videos, social media content, e-commerce showcases, music performances, character dialogues, and narrated content. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

2.question: How long can Kling 2.6 Pro videos be?
2.answer: Kling 2.6 Pro can generate videos up to 10 seconds in length with complete audio-visual content including speech, sound effects, and ambient sounds.

3.question: What audio types does Kling 2.6 Pro support?
3.answer: Kling 2.6 Pro supports speech, dialogue, narration, singing, rap, ambient sound effects, and mixed sound effects. It currently supports Chinese and English voice generation.

4.question: How is the audio quality in Kling 2.6 Pro?
4.answer: Kling 2.6 Pro generates cleaner, richly layered audio that closely mirrors realistic audio mixing. The audio-visual coordination ensures tight synchronization between voice rhythm, ambient sound, and visual motion.

5.question: How does Kling 2.6 Pro compare to other AI video models?
5.answer: Kling 2.6 Pro stands out for its simultaneous audio-visual generation capability, eliminating the need for separate dubbing workflows. While Veo 3 also offers audio generation, Kling 2.6 Pro excels in Chinese voice generation and audio-visual coordination.
